zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanch Leigh於1430年出生在英國藍卡爾阿德林頓時，她的父親Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington20歲，母親Isabell Stanley19歲。她於1450年與Richard de Lancaster在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1483年在英國藍卡爾萊爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.Adlington, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾阿德林頓

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanch Leigh于1430年出生在英国藍卡爾阿德林頓时，她的父亲Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington20岁，母亲Isabell Stanley19岁。她于1450年与Richard de Lancaster在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1483年在英国藍卡爾萊爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Blanch Leigh was born in 1430, in Adlington, Lancashire, England, her father, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, was 20 and her mother, Isabell Stanley, was 19. She married Richard de Lancaster in 1450, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1483, in Rainhill, Lancashire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanch Leigh est née en 1430, à Adlington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Isabell Stanley, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Lancaster en 1450, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1483, à Rainhill, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanch Leigh 1430 in Adlington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington 20 und ihre Mutter Isabell Stanley 19. Sie hat 1450 in England, United Kingdom Richard de Lancaster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1483 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Rainhill, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanch Leigh è nata il nel 1430 nel Adlington, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Isabell Stanley, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Lancaster nel 1450, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1483, nel Rainhill, Lancashire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanch Leighが1430年にイギリスランカシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlingtonは20歳，母Isabell Stanleyは19歳であった。1450年にイギリスイギリスでRichard de Lancasterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1483年にイギリスランカシュアイアレインヒルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanch Leigh(이)가 1430년 영국 랭카실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabell Stanley(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard de Lancaster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1483년 영국 랭카실르 레이힐에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanch Leigh nasceu em 1430, em Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Stanley, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Lancaster em 1450, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1483, em Rainhill, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanch Leigh родилась в 1430 г. в местности адлингтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Stanley, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Lancaster в 1450 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1483 г. в местности реинилл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanch Leigh nació en 1430, en Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Isabell Stanley, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Richard de Lancaster en 1450, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1483, en Rainhill, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
